markdown.preview.theme.title: Preview Theme
markdown.preview.theme.description: Colour theme used inside the preview pane.

markdown.preview.fontFamily.defaultValue: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
markdown.preview.fontFamily.title: Font Family
markdown.preview.fontFamily.description: Font family used for rendered preview text.

markdown.preview.fontSize.title: Font Size
markdown.preview.fontSize.description: Base font size (px) for preview body text.

markdown.preview.lineHeight.title: Line Height
markdown.preview.lineHeight.description: Line height multiplier for body text.

markdown.preview.maxWidth.title: Max Content Width
markdown.preview.maxWidth.markdownDescription: Maximum width (px) of the preview content column. Set to `0` for full width.

markdown.preview.codeFontFamily.title: Code Font Family
markdown.preview.codeFontFamily.description: Font family used inside fenced code blocks.

markdown.preview.codeTheme.title: Code Block Theme
markdown.preview.codeTheme.description: Syntax highlighting colour scheme for code blocks.

markdown.preview.autoRefresh.title: Auto Refresh
markdown.preview.autoRefresh.description: Automatically re-render the preview when the source file changes.

markdown.preview.refreshDelay.title: Refresh Delay (ms)
markdown.preview.refreshDelay.description: Debounce delay before re-checking the file for changes.

markdown.preview.syncScroll.title: Sync Scroll With Editor
markdown.preview.syncScroll.markdownDescription: Scroll the preview to follow the editor's visible line range. Requires editor scroll-position support — falls back silently if unavailable.

markdown.preview.breakOnSingleNewline.title: Single Line Break = New Line
markdown.preview.breakOnSingleNewline.description:
Treat a single newline as a
(GitHub comment-style breaks) instead of requiring a blank line.

markdown.preview.taskListsReadonly.title: Task Lists Read-Only
markdown.preview.taskListsReadonly.markdownDescription: When disabled, checking a box writes `[x]`/`[ ]` back to the source file. When enabled, checkboxes are display-only.

markdown.preview.enableMath.title: Enable Math (KaTeX)
markdown.preview.enableMath.markdownDescription: Render `$inline$` and `$$block$$` math expressions using KaTeX.

markdown.preview.enableMermaid.title: Enable Mermaid Diagrams
markdown.preview.enableMermaid.markdownDescription: Render ```mermaid\n``` code fences as flowcharts, sequence diagrams, etc.

markdown.preview.headingAnchors.title: Heading Anchor Links
markdown.preview.headingAnchors.description: Show a clickable '#' link next to each heading for deep-linking.

markdown.preview.smartQuotes.title: Smart Typography
markdown.preview.smartQuotes.description: Convert straight quotes, double hyphens, and ellipses into their typographic equivalents.

markdown.preview.showLineNumbers.title: Show Line Numbers
markdown.preview.showLineNumbers.description: Display line numbers in the gutter of fenced code blocks.

markdown.preview.copyCodeButton.title: Copy Code Button
markdown.preview.copyCodeButton.description: Show a copy-to-clipboard button on hover over code blocks.

markdown.preview.wrapLongLines.title: Wrap Long Code Lines
markdown.preview.wrapLongLines.description: Wrap long lines inside code blocks instead of showing a horizontal scrollbar.

markdown.preview.showTableOfContents.title: Show Table of Contents
markdown.preview.showTableOfContents.description: Display an auto-generated, clickable table of contents alongside the preview.

markdown.preview.imageMaxWidth.title: Image Max Width
markdown.preview.imageMaxWidth.markdownDescription: CSS max-width applied to all images (e.g. `100%`, `600px`).

markdown.preview.lazyLoadImages.title: Lazy-Load Images
markdown.preview.lazyLoadImages.description: Defer loading off-screen images until scrolled into view.

markdown.preview.openLinksExternally.title: Open Links Externally
markdown.preview.openLinksExternally.description: Open http(s) links in the system browser instead of inside the IDE.

markdown.preview.frontmatter.style.title: Front Matter Display
markdown.preview.frontmatter.style.description: How YAML front matter at the top of the file is displayed.

markdown.preview.wordsPerMinute.title: Reading Speed (wpm)
markdown.preview.wordsPerMinute.description: Average words-per-minute used to estimate reading time.

markdown.security.allowRawHtml.title: Allow Raw HTML
markdown.security.allowRawHtml.description: Render raw HTML tags embedded in markdown (e.g. <div>, <iframe>). Disable for untrusted files.

markdown.security.sanitizeHtml.title: Sanitize Raw HTML
markdown.security.sanitizeHtml.description: Strip dangerous tags and attributes from embedded raw HTML, even when raw HTML is allowed.

markdown.security.allowScripts.title: Allow <script> Execution
markdown.security.allowScripts.markdownDescription: ⚠️ Execute `<script>` tags embedded in markdown. Strongly discouraged — only enable for fully trusted local files.

markdown.export.includeStyles.title: Embed Styles in Export
markdown.export.includeStyles.description: Embed the preview theme's CSS directly into exported HTML files.

markdown.export.outputDirectory.title: Export Output Directory
markdown.export.outputDirectory.markdownDescription: Directory for exported files. Leave empty to export next to the source `.md` file.
